feedback_addressed: Added valuation justification framework for every pick above 30x PE with PEG analysis and required growth rates
Added defense budget scenario analysis: 4 scenarios ($0.95T to $1.5T) with probability weights and per-pick EPS impact for RTX and LMT
Added position sizing with entry prices, target prices, stop-losses, and scenario-based price targets for every pick
Downgraded multiple picks: RTX from STRONG_BUY to BUY, ETN from STRONG_BUY to BUY, TDG from STRONG_BUY to BUY, PWR from BUY to HOLD, GEV from BUY to HOLD
Added backlog quality analysis distinguishing firm orders from framework agreements with historical cancellation rates
Added TDG leverage justification: negative equity explained as deliberate leveraged equity model with 52% EBITDA margins on 90% proprietary revenue
Added TDG regulatory pricing scrutiny analysis: 18% probability of forced repricing, 8% affected revenue, -$2.00 to -$4.50 EPS impact
Added GEV margin bridge analysis from 8.5% to 20% EBITDA with 5 drivers and confidence ratings
Added PWR margin analysis: 5.8% margins, no comparable industrial services company has sustained 40x+ for more than 2-3 years
Added Eaton data center order quantification: $5-6B annual business, 200% growth is on substantial base, $239B mega-project announcements
Added interest rate sensitivity analysis for capital-intensive picks (TDG $250M per 100bps, LMT $180M per 100bps)
Added tariff impact quantification by pick ($30M TDG to $350M GEV)
Added labor wage inflation analysis: PWR most exposed at -80bps margin impact
Acknowledged Morningstar data: industrials sector has highest percentage of overvalued stocks (26.85%)
remaining_flaws: XLI correlation analysis requested in v1 is not explicitly provided -- while individual correlations can be inferred, a formal correlation matrix would strengthen the portfolio construction case
GEV wind energy loss analysis is present in the margin bridge but the specific current burn rate and break-even timeline are not provided with dollar precision

The sector still has 5 BUY-rated picks all trading above 25x forward PE -- while downgrades were made, a more aggressive pruning to 3-4 names would better reflect the overvaluation the analyst acknowledges
what_impressed: Defense budget probability-weighted analysis with sequestration scenario (5% probability, -22% LMT EPS) shows the analyst can model tail risks
TDG leverage justification is thorough and honest: acknowledged as deliberate strategy with 52% EBITDA margins while flagging $250M interest cost per 100bps as the primary risk
GEV margin bridge with confidence ratings per component (HIGH for gas services, MEDIUM for wind loss reduction) gives investors a clear picture of what could go wrong
PWR downgrade to HOLD with the finding that no industrial services company has sustained 40x+ for more than 2-3 years is the kind of historical grounding v1 lacked
Backlog quality analysis distinguishing 75-80% firm orders from framework agreements with 2-8% cancellation rates is genuinely useful
Tariff quantification at the individual company level ($30M TDG to $350M GEV) combined with labor inflation analysis shows multi-layered cost pressure understanding
